description: Agent index for Intent Gate routing and auto-activation.

agents.name: Memory Archivist
agents.description: The Historian. Archives specs.md and session learnings to structured memory for RAG queries.

agents.name: Codebase Search
agents.description: Fast file and code discovery. Haiku-tier for mechanical extraction.

agents.name: Librarian
agents.description: External research with GitHub permalinks and documentation fetching.

agents.name: Scaffolder
agents.description: Generate boilerplate code following conventions. Haiku-tier for fast scaffolding.

agents.name: Tech Docs Writer
agents.description: Technical documentation specialist. README, API docs, architecture guides.

agents.name: Code Reviewer
agents.description: Routine code review for style, simple bugs, and obvious improvements.

agents.name: Python Pro
agents.description: Expert Python development with modern patterns. Auto-activated for Python projects.

agents.name: Python UX (PySide6)
agents.description: PySide6/Qt6 GUI development expert. Desktop application UI specialist.

agents.name: R Pro
agents.description: Expert R development with S4 OOP, tidyverse, and bioinformatics patterns.

agents.name: R Shiny Pro
agents.description: Shiny application expert with module architecture and R6/S4 state management.

agents.name: GO Pro
agents.description: Expert GO development. Auto-activated for GO projects. Single-binary desktop distribution focus.

agents.name: Rust Pro
agents.description: Expert Rust development with modern patterns. Auto-activated for Rust projects. Single-binary desktop distribution focus with edition 2024.

agents.name: GO CLI (Cobra)
agents.description: Cobra CLI specialist. Factory pattern, Viper config, shell completion.

agents.name: GO TUI (Bubbletea)
agents.description: Bubbletea TUI specialist. MVU architecture, Lipgloss styling, component composition.

agents.name: GO API (HTTP Client)
agents.description: HTTP client specialist. Timeouts, retries, rate limiting, SSE streaming.

agents.name: GO Concurrent
agents.description: Concurrency specialist. Worker pools, errgroup, semaphores, channels, graceful shutdown.

agents.name: Orchestrator
agents.description: Handles ambiguous scope, cross-module planning, user interviews, design tradeoffs, and debugging loops. Uses Scout-First Protocol.

agents.name: Architect
agents.description: Implementation planner (opus tier). Produces implementation-plan.json + specs.md + TaskCreate calls. Reads scout reports and strategy documents for context.

agents.name: Python ML Architect
agents.description: Opus-tier ML architecture decisions. Handles attention mechanism choices, loss function design, multi-task learning strategy, training curriculum design. Spawnable by python-pro for implementation guidance. Outputs structured decision documents.

agents.name: Planner
agents.description: Strategic planner (opus tier). Transforms goals into requirements, risks, and high-level approach. Produces strategy.md for architect.

agents.name: Einstein
agents.description: Theoretical analysis agent for Braintrust workflow. Performs deep reasoning using first principles, conceptual frameworks, and novel approaches. Spawned by Mozart, outputs to Beethoven.

agents.name: Mozart
agents.description: Problem decomposition orchestrator for Braintrust workflow. Conducts interviews, spawns scouts, assembles Problem Brief, dispatches Einstein + Staff-Architect in parallel, hands off to Beethoven.

agents.name: Beethoven
agents.description: Synthesis and composition agent for Braintrust workflow. Receives orthogonal analyses from Einstein and Staff-Architect, resolves contradictions, produces unified Braintrust Analysis document.

agents.name: Gemini Slave
agents.description: Large-context analysis subagent with 1M+ token window. Includes scout protocol for pre-routing reconnaissance.

agents.name: Staff Architect Critical Review
agents.description: Critical review of implementation plans using 7-layer framework. Invoked via /review-plan command or automatically in /plan workflow.

agents.name: Schema Architect
agents.description: Opus-tier schema extension specialist. Transforms boilerplate agent .md files into production-quality agents with deep domain expertise. Produces expanded body content and expansion reports. Leaf agent with no spawning capability.

agents.name: Haiku Scout
agents.description: Legacy fallback scout. Prefer gogent-scout which auto-routes between native and Gemini backends.

agents.name: GOgent Smart Scout
agents.description: Unified scout with smart backend routing. Native Go for small scopes (<40 score), Gemini 3 Flash for large. Always returns valid JSON.

agents.name: TypeScript Pro
agents.description: Expert TypeScript development with strict types and modern patterns. Auto-activated for TypeScript projects.

agents.name: React Pro
agents.description: React specialist with hooks, Ink TUI components, and state management. Auto-activated for React patterns.

agents.name: Backend Reviewer
agents.description: Backend code review specialist. API design, data patterns, error handling, concurrency.

agents.name: Frontend Reviewer
agents.description: Frontend code review specialist. Component architecture, state management, hooks, performance.

agents.name: Standards Reviewer
agents.description: Code standards review specialist. Naming, organization, documentation, consistency.

agents.name: Architect Reviewer
agents.description: Architectural code review specialist. Module boundaries, dependency health, design patterns, change impact.

agents.name: Review Orchestrator
agents.description: Coordinates multi-domain code review. Spawns specialized reviewers, synthesizes findings.

agents.name: Implementation Manager
agents.description: Implementation coordinator. Enforces specs.md adherence, injects conventions, validates task completion, runs mid-flight reviews.

agents.name: LLM Inference Architect
agents.description: Opus-tier LLM inference systems architect specializing in llama.cpp ecosystem, Vulkan/CPU backends on AMD hardware, KV cache optimization, memory arithmetic, and hardware feasibility analysis. Performs adversarial review of deployment plans, generates preflight verification scripts, and produces hardware-grounded architectural decisions. Expert in RoPE mechanics, KV compression techniques (TriAttention, TurboQuant, KVTC), UMA/iGPU zero-copy optimization, and the full GGML tensor pipeline.

agents.name: Genomics Reviewer
agents.description: Genome assembly, variant calling, alignment, and sequence data format review. BWA/Bowtie2/STAR, GATK/bcftools, VCF/BAM/FASTA/FASTQ/GFF/GTF/BED.
default_acceptance_criteria: All files read before generating findings
Severity classification follows bioinformatics review standards

agents.name: Proteomics Reviewer
agents.description: Mass spectrometry proteomics data processing review. Search engine config, FDR control, quantification (TMT/iTRAQ/LFQ/SILAC), mzML/mzXML, PSM scoring.
default_acceptance_criteria: All files read before generating findings
Severity classification follows bioinformatics review standards

agents.name: Proteogenomics Reviewer
agents.description: Proteogenomics pipeline review. Custom protein DB construction, novel peptide ID, variant peptides, splice junction peptides, ORF prediction.
default_acceptance_criteria: All files read before generating findings
Severity classification follows bioinformatics review standards

agents.name: Proteoform Reviewer
agents.description: Top-down proteomics and proteoform analysis review. Intact mass, PTM combinatorics, proteoform families, deconvolution, sequence coverage.
default_acceptance_criteria: All files read before generating findings
Severity classification follows bioinformatics review standards

agents.name: Mass Spectrometry Reviewer
agents.description: MS instrumentation and data acquisition review. DDA/DIA/PRM methods, calibration, raw data quality, vendor formats (Thermo/Bruker/SCIEX/Waters), spectral processing.
default_acceptance_criteria: All files read before generating findings
Severity classification follows bioinformatics review standards

agents.name: Bioinformatician Reviewer
agents.description: Pipeline architecture and methodology review. Nextflow/Snakemake/WDL workflows, Docker/Singularity/Conda reproducibility, statistics, data provenance.
default_acceptance_criteria: All files read before generating findings
Severity classification follows bioinformatics review standards

agents.name: Pasteur
agents.description: Bioinformatics review synthesizer. Deduplicates findings across domain reviewers, identifies cross-domain contradictions, produces unified BLOCK/WARNING/APPROVE verdict.

scout_first_protocol.description: Spawn scout before committing expensive resources

complexity_routing.description: Code-enforced tier selection based on complexity score
